name: Mermail Abyssgaios
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水精鱗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マーメイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ガイオアビス
desc:
2 Level 7 WATER monsters
While this card has material, Level 5 or higher monsters cannot attack. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the effects of all face-up monsters your opponent currently controls with less ATK than this card, until the end of this turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
